---
# BENCH NOTE TEMPLATE — copy, rename, fill in.  Remove this comment block.
# Filename:  bench-notes/<slug>.qmd
# The title should be short — it appears in card listings.
title: "<Bench Note title — one topic>"
subtitle: "<One-sentence scope statement>"
author: Robert Waddy
date: last-modified
categories: [<thread>, <sub-topic>]   # e.g. [uncertainty, fitting]
bibliography: ../references.bib
---

::: {.bench-note-page}

```{=html}
<div style="display:flex; align-items:baseline; gap:0.6rem; margin-bottom:1rem;">
  <span style="background:#a08030;color:#fff;font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:700;
               letter-spacing:0.06em;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:3px;">
    BENCH NOTE
  </span>
  <span style="color:#7a5c00;font-size:0.9rem;"><em><Thread> &mdash; <sub-topic></em></span>
</div>
```

---

## Concept {.bn-concept}

<span class="bn-field-label">Concept</span>

*One paragraph: what is this and why does it matter experimentally?*

---

## Governing equations {.bn-equations}

<span class="bn-field-label">Governing equations</span>

$$
<\text{key equation 1}>
$$ {#eq-bn-<slug>-1}

$$
<\text{key equation 2}>
$$ {#eq-bn-<slug>-2}

**Symbol table:**

| Symbol | Meaning | Typical units |
|--------|---------|--------------|
| $<x>$ | <description> | <units> |

---

## Decision rule / table {.bn-decision}

<span class="bn-field-label">Decision rule</span>

| Situation | Recommendation |
|-----------|---------------|
| <case 1> | <action 1> |
| <case 2> | <action 2> |

---

## Failure modes {.bn-failures}

<span class="bn-field-label">Failure modes</span>

| Symptom | Most likely cause | Fix |
|---------|------------------|-----|
| <symptom 1> | <cause> | <fix> |
| <symptom 2> | <cause> | <fix> |

---

## See also {.bn-seealso}

<span class="bn-field-label">See also</span>

- Module @sec-<related-module> (<Module title>)
- Bench Note: [<related bench note>](<slug>.qmd)

---

## References {.bn-refs}

<span class="bn-field-label">References</span>

[@<key>; @<key2>]

:::
